name: Gradient Abstract
description: Abstract gradient artwork with flowing shapes. Ideal for hero sections, backgrounds, and decorative section imagery.
style_prompt: Abstract gradient art, flowing organic shapes, smooth color transitions, modern minimalist, soft mesh gradients, glass morphism elements, subtle bokeh, futuristic and clean, no text, no people
color_guidance: blue to purple gradient, with white and light accents, soft glowing elements, can include subtle geometric shapes floating in the gradient
avoid: sharp edges, photorealism, text in image, busy patterns, dark mood
